science.title: Scientists create supercharged vitamin K that helps the brain heal itself
science.summary: Scientists in Japan have created powerful new vitamin K-based compounds that may help the brain regenerate lost neurons — a breakthrough that could one day change how diseases like Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s are treated. science.title: Scientists Challenge a 70-Year-Old Theory of Language With a Surprising Discovery
science.summary: A new study challenges the widely accepted idea that word meanings are organized around emotion. After analyzing billions of words, scientists found that language may be shaped by something more basic: the need for safety. science.title: New solar desalination breakthrough makes fresh water without toxic brine
science.summary: Scientists have developed a solar desalination system that turns seawater into drinking water without creating environmentally damaging brine. science.title: The ocean's health may depend on a tiny microbe inside fish
science.summary: A surprising new discovery suggests that tiny microbes living inside fish may be helping shape the chemistry of the world’s oceans. medicine.title: Gene test can safely spare many breast cancer patients of chemotherapy
medicine.summary: Many people with breast cancer can safely avoid chemotherapy with the use of a gene test, potentially sparing them unnecessary side effects without increasing the risk of the cancer returning, a large international clinical trial led by UCL has found.
